text_original: The people suffer from famine because of the multitude of taxes consumed by their superiors.
text_normalized: The people suffer from famine because of the multitude of taxes consumed by their superiors.

text_original: It is through this that they suffer famine.
text_normalized: It is through this that they suffer famine.

text_original: The people are difficult to govern because of the (excessive) agency of their superiors (in governing them).
text_normalized: The people are difficult to govern because of the (excessive) agency of their superiors (in governing them).

text_original: It is through this that they are difficult to govern.
text_normalized: It is through this that they are difficult to govern.

text_original: The people make light of dying because of the greatness of their labours in seeking for the means of living.
text_normalized: The people make light of dying because of the greatness of their labours in seeking for the means of living.

text_original: It is this which makes them think light of dying.
text_normalized: It is this which makes them think light of dying.

text_original: Thus it is that to leave the subject of living altogether out of view is better than to set a high value on it.
text_normalized: Thus it is that to leave the subject of living altogether out of view is better than to set a high value on it.
